SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.cardsModifier: Tectonic cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.description:
The last Ironclad, who embraced demonic will.
Armed and armored with the earth itself.
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.goldMonologue: Precious metal. Thy shalt put it to good use.
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_IRONCLAD.title: The Tectonic
SHADOWFALL-SHADOW_REGENT.banter.alive.en: I'm no waiter, and this isn't the galley.

Heir of the Stars who rejected the crown.
Supported by his ship, The Sovereign.
